problem.passage:
16. Read <A> and <B> and follow the directions. [2.5점]
<A>
The following is a conversation between two students (S1
and S2) about a first draft S2 produced in a writing class.
S1: I have never heard of pluralism. Pluralism in your
writing is not clear to me. What is “pluralism”?
S2: Don’t know the word?
S1: No, I really didn’t understand. I think maybe you
define pluralism a little bit.
S2: Uh... in the Cold War, there is only one superpower
and is the United States. But after that time, Europe
became another superpower and the power of the
United States is declined....
S1: Began to decline?
S2: Yes. The power of the United States began to
decline. So this situation is pluralism.
S1: OK. Now I understand that. But here I think you
should state reasons in the introductory part why
pluralism started.
S2: Hmm. Right, I’ll revise it and we’ll talk about it again.
*S1: Student 1, S2: Student 2
<B>
a. Meaning negotiation occurs in this conversation.
b. S1 requests clarification of the concept of “pluralism”
through display questions.
c. S1 gives comments on both meaning and organization
in S2’s draft.
d. S1’s negative feedback on the form leads to an
unsuccessful uptake by S2.
e. The conversation demonstrates a process-oriented
approach to writing through peer review.
Choose all the correct statements about <A> from the list in
<B>.
① a, c, d ② a, c, e
③ a, d, e ④ b, c, e
⑤ c, d, e
5
중 면)
18. Read <A> and <B> and answer the question. [2.5점]
<A>

_extraction.note: 자동 추출 초안. passage/meta/answer 모두 수동 보완 필요.
